context.role: End game screen showing final score and restart instructions
context.screen_position: Center of screen at (300, 75), text elements offset vertically from center
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player collides with obstacle, displays final score and high score, waits for Space key to restart

visual_specification.shape: Multiple text lines vertically stacked and center-aligned

animation.description: Static text display, optional 0.5-second blink on restart instruction text

visual_specification.details: 4 text elements: 'GAME OVER' (24px, y=-30), 'Score: XXXXX' (16px, y=0), 'HI XXXXX' (16px, y=20), 'Press SPACE to restart' (12px, y=50), all center-aligned

relationships.shared_with: Same font style as score_display, same color scheme
relationships.differences_from: score_display is single line 16px, game_over_screen has multiple text sizes (24px, 16px, 12px)

explicit_negations: No sound effect indicators in UI
